description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden cabinet and shelving unit, featuring a combination of closed and open storage spaces. The left section consists of a long, low cabinet with a flat top surface, suitable for placing items or sitting. The right section rises vertically and includes a tall shelving unit with both open shelves and closed compartments, some of which have visible handles. The cabinet appears to have a mix of wood and possibly metal or laminate trim, with a glass or acrylic panel on the upper shelving area. The design is modern and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The overall finish is smooth, with a light wood tone dominating the exterior.
description: A modern L-shaped wooden cabinet and shelving unit with both open and closed storage, featuring a mix of wood, glass, and metal accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, with both the long horizontal cabinet and the tall shelving unit, including visible handles and compartments.
description_view_1: Side view of the tall shelving unit, highlighting its vertical structure and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panels of both the cabinet and shelving unit, with less detail on handles or openings.
description_view_3: Side view of the long horizontal cabinet, emphasizing the length and flat top surface.
